reviews.review_description:
First impressions review & gameplay here:

https://youtu.be/aZhJV7aWD_c


Great game! Love the whole Blaston-style bullet pacing and the big variety of monsters! Catchy music too!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review and I appreciate the video recording/editing/thumbnail creation. Please subscribe to Ballsy VR for awesome VR related content!
